options.name: -check_only
options.description: Allows you to specify warning types. Valid entries in warning_list are: clock_expected, clock_not_propagated, no_gen_clock_source, master_clk_edge_not_reaching, multiple_clock, data_check_multiple_reference_signal, data_check_no_reference_signal, clock_gating_no_data, clock_gating_controlling_edge_unknown, clock_missing_at_sequential_output, pulse_non-pulse_clock_merge, invalid_pll_configuration, clocks_masked_by_another_clock, uncons_endpoint, max_delay_constrained_internal_endpoint, no_arr, async_arr, missing_arr, specific_async_arr, no_drive, loop, ideal_clock_waveform, clock_crossing, clock_clipping_gate, clock_clipping_freq, const_collision, signal_level ,missing_drive,missing_clock_groups and unexpandable_clock

options.name: -clock_crossing_output_format
options.description: {summary csv} Specifies format of clock crossing report to be generated

options.name: -exclude_warning
options.description: Excludes the specified warning types when generating the report

options.name: -include_warning
options.description: Includes the specified warning types when generating the report

options.name: -tcl_list
options.description: Produces the report in Tcl list format instead of a tabular format

options.name: -type
options.description: Limits the checks to the specified type

options.name: -verbose
options.description: Gives detailed information about the warnings

options.name: -view
options.description: Reports warning(s) that belong to the specified view (string, optional) > <file_name[.gz]> # Output file name (redirect_operator, optional) >> <file_name[.gz]> # Output file name
